title: docs: consolidate GPU instance docs into single file
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the GPU shed
gist.blurb: We've swept up our scattered GPU instance documentation into one tidy file. Easier tracking for all our compute nodes means a happier hive.
gist.summary: Consolidated multiple GPU instance documentation files into a single comprehensive guide and added RunPod instances to the inventory.
gist.impact: Maintainers now have a single source of truth for tracking GPU deployments and monitoring service health.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing scattered server/GPU files into one neat master folder. The Monitor Robot helping out. Cozy server room or library vibe.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, organizing scattered glowing computer chips into a single neat folder. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head helps stack the chips. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, organizing scattered glowing computer chips into a single neat folder.
